disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden onset of severe lower-back pain at the exact moment of a heavy manual lift/transfer, with a felt pop or tearing
trigger_question_examples: What were you doing when the pain started?
Did anything happen right before it came on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It hit the instant I lifted a resident who couldn't take their own weight — I felt a pop, then everything locked up.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Complete functional incapacity — the patient is on the floor and cannot stand, bear weight, or self-transport
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to stand or move at all?
Can you get yourself to a car?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No — I'm stuck flat on the floor. I can't stand, I can't crawl, I can't even sit up.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No radicular leg symptoms — denies shooting leg pain, numbness or pins-and-needles
trigger_question_examples: Any pain, numbness or tingling shooting down into your legs?
Is the pain only in your back, or does it travel?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, nothing going down my legs — no numbness or tingling. It's all in the muscles of my back.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No cauda-equina features — normal bladder and bowel control, no saddle numbness (red-flag screen negative by history)
trigger_question_examples: Any trouble controlling your bladder or bowels, or any numbness around the saddle/groin area?
Have you noticed any difficulty passing urine since this started?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my waterworks and bowels are completely normal and I've got no numbness around my groin or bottom.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Occupational injury — happened at work during patient handling; the hoist was available but not used; needs formal documentation
trigger_question_examples: Was there any lifting equipment you could have used?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, it's a work injury — I was doing a manual transfer. The hoist was in the corner but I didn't use it for this one. I'll need it documented.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No analgesia taken yet — unable to reach any medication while stranded on the floor
trigger_question_examples: Have you been able to take any pain relief?
Is there anyone who can bring you medication?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't had anything — I can't reach the cupboard from down here on the floor.
